definitions.Name: HELPER_API_KEY
definitions.Description: Primary backend bootstrap key.

definitions.Name: HELPER_ROOT
definitions.Description: Optional explicit helper root. Usually auto-discovered.
definitions.Notes: Keep unset unless auto-discovery is wrong.

definitions.Name: HELPER_DATA_ROOT
definitions.Description: Runtime data root. Must live outside the repository source tree.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PROJECTS_ROOT
definitions.Description: Workspace/project output root. Defaults under HELPER_DATA_ROOT.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LIBRARY_ROOT
definitions.Description: Library root. Defaults under HELPER_DATA_ROOT.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LOGS_ROOT
definitions.Description: Logs root. Defaults under HELPER_DATA_ROOT.

definitions.Name: HELPER_TEMPLATES_ROOT
definitions.Description: Template library root. Defaults under HELPER_LIBRARY_ROOT\forge_templates.

definitions.Name: HELPER_CONVERSATION_STORE_PATH
definitions.Description: Optional explicit conversation store file path.

definitions.Name: HELPER_SESSION_SIGNING_KEY
definitions.Description: Dedicated session signing secret for issued browser tokens.

definitions.Name: HELPER_AUTH_ALLOW_LOCAL_BOOTSTRAP
definitions.Description: Allow local `/api/auth/session` bootstrap outside the default Development/Local inference.
definitions.Notes: Leave unset for normal local development.

definitions.Name: HELPER_ALLOW_LOCAL_BOOTSTRAP
definitions.Description: Legacy alias for HELPER_AUTH_ALLOW_LOCAL_BOOTSTRAP.

definitions.Name: HELPER_SESSION_TTL_MIN_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Lower bound for issued session token TTL.

definitions.Name: HELPER_SESSION_TTL_MAX_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Upper bound for issued session token TTL.

definitions.Name: HELPER_SESSION_TOKEN_TTL_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Legacy default session TTL override.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LOCAL_BOOTSTRAP_SCOPES
definitions.Description: Optional local bootstrap scope override. Values are intersected with the allowed local scope bundle.

definitions.Name: HELPER_AUTH_KEYS_PATH
definitions.Description: Optional explicit auth key store path.

definitions.Name: HELPER_AUTH_KEYS_JSON
definitions.Description: Inline auth key bootstrap payload. Prefer HELPER_AUTH_KEYS_PATH for persisted local setups.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_WARMUP_MODE
definitions.Description: Warmup intensity at startup.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_WARMUP_CATEGORIES
definitions.Description: Model categories to warm when warmup is enabled.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_PREFLIGHT_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Enable model preflight probes during startup.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_PREFLIGHT_TIMEOUT_SEC
definitions.Description: Per-probe preflight timeout.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_PREFLIGHT_WARN_MS
definitions.Description: Warn threshold for preflight duration.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WARMUP_IDLE_WINDOW_MS
definitions.Description: Idle spacing between warmup calls.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WARMUP_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: Startup warmup budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_POOL_INTERACTIVE
definitions.Description: Interactive pool concurrency.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_POOL_BACKGROUND
definitions.Description: Background pool concurrency.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_POOL_MAINTENANCE
definitions.Description: Maintenance pool concurrency.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_TIMEOUT_INTERACTIVE_SEC
definitions.Description: Interactive call timeout.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_TIMEOUT_BACKGROUND_SEC
definitions.Description: Background call timeout.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_TIMEOUT_MAINTENANCE_SEC
definitions.Description: Maintenance call timeout.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_FAST
definitions.Description: Optional fast-model override / fallback route.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_REASONING
definitions.Description: Optional reasoning-model override / fallback route.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_LONG_CONTEXT
definitions.Description: Optional long-context reasoning model override.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_DEEP_REASONING
definitions.Description: Optional deep-reasoning model override.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_VERIFIER
definitions.Description: Optional verifier / critic model override for reasoning checks.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_CRITIC
definitions.Description: Optional critic-model override / fallback route.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_SAFE_FALLBACK
definitions.Description: Optional safe fallback model name.

definitions.Name: HELPER_CONVERSATION_PERSIST_FLUSH_MS
definitions.Description: Write-behind flush delay.

definitions.Name: HELPER_CONVERSATION_JOURNAL_COMPACTION_THRESHOLD
definitions.Description: Journal compaction threshold.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PERSISTENCE_QUEUE_CAPACITY
definitions.Description: Write-behind queue capacity.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PERSISTENCE_QUEUE_BATCH_SIZE
definitions.Description: Write-behind batch size.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PERSISTENCE_QUEUE_BACKLOG_ALERT
definitions.Description: Persistence backlog alert threshold.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PERSISTENCE_LAG_ALERT_MS
definitions.Description: Persistence lag alert threshold.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POST_TURN_AUDIT_QUEUE_CAPACITY
definitions.Description: Audit queue capacity.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POST_TURN_AUDIT_TIMEOUT_SEC
definitions.Description: Audit worker timeout.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POST_TURN_AUDIT_MAX_ATTEMPTS
definitions.Description: Maximum audit retry attempts.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POST_TURN_AUDIT_BACKLOG_ALERT
definitions.Description: Audit backlog alert threshold.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POST_TURN_AUDIT_FAILURE_ALERT
definitions.Description: Audit failure-rate alert threshold.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RESEARCH_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Enable research routing.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RESEARCH_CACHE_TTL_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Research cache TTL in minutes.

definitions.Name: HELPER_GROUNDING_CASUAL_CHAT_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Allow grounding for casual chat.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RESEARCH_MAX_SOURCES
definitions.Description: Maximum grounded sources per response.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RESPONSE_SHOW_LOCAL_PATHS
definitions.Description: Expose absolute local library paths in local source labels. Defaults to false so public proof artifacts remain path-redacted.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LOCAL_LIBRARY_PUBLIC_SOURCE_MODE
definitions.Description: Local-library source rendering mode for public artifacts.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LOCAL_LIBRARY_ALLOW_CURRENT_FACTS
definitions.Description: Allow explicitly trusted local-library documents to support current external facts. Defaults to false; web remains required for fresh/regulatory claims.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LOCAL_LIBRARY_CURRENT_FACT_ALLOWLIST
definitions.Description: Optional stable source IDs allowed by operator policy to support current-fact claims.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MIXED_EVIDENCE_REQUIRE_WEB_FOR_FRESH
definitions.Description: Require web evidence for freshness-sensitive claims even when local library evidence is available.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RESEARCH_BACKGROUND_BUDGET
definitions.Description: Background research parallelism budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_LOCAL_URL
definitions.Description: Primary local web-search endpoint used by the local provider adapter.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_SEARX_URL
definitions.Description: Optional secondary Searx-compatible endpoint used for graceful failover.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_ORDER
definitions.Description: Ordered provider IDs for web-search failover. Supported values currently include `local,searx`.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_TIMEOUT_SEC
definitions.Description: Per-provider web-search timeout before mux failover.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_COST_BUDGET_UNITS
definitions.Description: Base cost budget units for provider selection per search turn before policy adjustments by search mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_LATENCY_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: Base total latency budget for provider selection per search turn before policy adjustments by search mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_COOLDOWN_SEC
definitions.Description: Cooldown window applied after consecutive provider timeouts or errors trip health thresholds.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_TIMEOUTS
definitions.Description: Consecutive timeout threshold before a provider enters cooldown.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_MAX_CONSECUTIVE_ERRORS
definitions.Description: Consecutive error threshold before a provider enters cooldown.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_PROVIDER_SLOW_LATENCY_MS
definitions.Description: Rolling latency threshold after which a provider is considered degraded for selection scoring.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_SEARCH_MAX_ITERATIONS
definitions.Description: Maximum iterative web-search passes per request.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_FETCH_MAX_REDIRECTS
definitions.Description: Maximum redirect hops allowed during provider/page fetch before the request is blocked.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_FETCH_USE_PROXY
definitions.Description: Whether outbound page/document fetches should honor the system proxy configuration. Defaults to false to avoid broken local proxy interception in offline/dev runtimes.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_PAGE_FETCH_TIMEOUT_SEC
definitions.Description: Per-page fetch timeout for full-page evidence retrieval.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_PAGE_MAX_BYTES
definitions.Description: Maximum bytes admitted for a single fetched page before extraction is aborted.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_PAGE_MAX_FETCHES_PER_SEARCH
definitions.Description: Maximum fetched pages per search session after search hits are selected.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_RENDER_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Enables isolated browser-render fallback for JS-heavy pages after normal HTTP extraction is insufficient.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_RENDER_MAX_PAGES_PER_SEARCH
definitions.Description: Maximum pages per search session that may use browser-render fallback.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_RENDER_TIMEOUT_SEC
definitions.Description: Timeout for a single browser-render fallback page load.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_RENDER_MAX_HTML_CHARS
definitions.Description: Maximum rendered HTML characters retained from browser-render fallback before extraction.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_EVIDENCE_GENERAL_STALE_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Maximum age before general web evidence is treated as stale and refreshed or disclosed.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_EVIDENCE_VOLATILE_STALE_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Maximum age before volatile categories such as finance/news/weather are treated as stale.

definitions.Name: HELPER_WEB_EVIDENCE_SOFTWARE_STALE_MINUTES
definitions.Description: Maximum age before software-version or release evidence is treated as stale.

definitions.Name: HELPER_STREAM_HEARTBEAT_SECONDS
definitions.Description: SSE heartbeat interval in seconds.

definitions.Name: HELPER_STREAM_DEADLINE_SECONDS
definitions.Description: SSE request deadline in seconds.

definitions.Name: HELPER_STREAM_HEARTBEAT_MS
definitions.Description: Legacy raw heartbeat interval override in milliseconds.

definitions.Name: HELPER_LISTEN_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: Startup listen budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_READINESS_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: Startup readiness budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_FIRST_TOKEN_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: First-token latency budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_P95_FULL_TURN_BUDGET_MS
definitions.Description: P95 full-turn latency budget.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POLICY_RESEARCH_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Policy gate for research routing.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POLICY_GROUNDING_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Policy gate for grounding.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POLICY_SYNC_CRITIC_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Policy gate for synchronous critic execution.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POLICY_ASYNC_AUDIT_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Policy gate for asynchronous post-turn audit.

definitions.Name: HELPER_SHADOW_MODE_ENABLED
definitions.Description: Enable shadow-mode execution paths.

definitions.Name: HELPER_POLICY_SAFE_FALLBACK_ONLY
definitions.Description: Restrict backend to safe fallback responses only.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_CODER
definitions.Description: Optional coder-model route.

definitions.Name: HELPER_MODEL_VISION
definitions.Description: Optional vision-model route.

definitions.Name: HELPER_PDF_VISION_GHOSTSCRIPT_PATH
definitions.Description: Explicit Ghostscript executable for PDF-to-image vision extraction.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_PIPELINE_VERSION
definitions.Description: Active library indexing pipeline version.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RAG_ALLOW_V1_FALLBACK
definitions.Description: Allow retrieval fallback to legacy v1 collections.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_EXCLUDED_EXTENSIONS
definitions.Description: Extensions excluded from ordered/reset indexing scripts and synthetic learning scans.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_EXCLUDED_FILES
definitions.Description: Explicit file paths excluded from ordered/reset indexing scripts and synthetic learning scans.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_MAX_CHUNKS_PER_DOCUMENT
definitions.Description: Default max chunks per document for v2 indexing.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_MAX_CHUNKS_PER_DOCUMENT_LARGE_REFERENCE
definitions.Description: Max chunks for large reference documents.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_LARGE_REFERENCE_MIN_PAGES
definitions.Description: Minimum page count to treat a document as a large reference.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_MAX_CHUNKS_PER_DOCUMENT_LARGE_DOCUMENT
definitions.Description: Max chunks for large-document indexing mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_LARGE_DOCUMENT_MIN_PAGES
definitions.Description: Minimum pages for large-document mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_LARGE_DOCUMENT_MIN_BLOCKS
definitions.Description: Minimum block count for large-document mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_INDEX_LARGE_DOCUMENT_MIN_OBSERVED_CHUNKS
definitions.Description: Minimum observed chunk count before forcing large-document mode.

definitions.Name: HELPER_ENABLE_AUTONOMOUS_EVOLUTION_AUTOSTART
definitions.Description: Autostart autonomous evolution on maintenance startup.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_API_PROTOCOL
definitions.Description: Frontend API protocol when VITE_HELPER_API_BASE is not set.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_API_HOST
definitions.Description: Frontend API host when VITE_HELPER_API_BASE is not set.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_API_PORT
definitions.Description: Frontend API port when VITE_HELPER_API_BASE is not set.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_API_BASE
definitions.Description: Explicit frontend API base URL.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_SESSION_SCOPES_CONVERSATION
definitions.Description: Optional conversation surface scope override.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_SESSION_SCOPES_RUNTIME_CONSOLE
definitions.Description: Optional runtime-console surface scope override.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_SESSION_SCOPES_BUILDER
definitions.Description: Optional builder surface scope override.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_SESSION_SCOPES_EVOLUTION
definitions.Description: Optional evolution surface scope override.

definitions.Name: VITE_API_BASE
definitions.Description: Legacy frontend API base variable.

definitions.Name: VITE_HELPER_SESSION_SCOPES
definitions.Description: Legacy single-surface scope override key.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RUNTIME_SMOKE_API_BASE
definitions.Description: API base URL used by runtime smoke and CI gates.

definitions.Name: HELPER_RUNTIME_SMOKE_UI_URL
definitions.Description: UI URL used by runtime UI perf smoke.

definitions.Name: HELPER_NUGET_SECURITY_GATE_MODE
definitions.Description: Overrides the NuGet security gate execution mode used by ci_gate.
definitions.Notes: When unset, scripts/ci_gate.ps1 derives strict-online only when CI=true and otherwise uses best-effort-local.

definitions.Name: HELPER_REMEDIATION_LOCK
definitions.Description: Explicit remediation freeze guard. CI expects `1` when freeze is active.
